name: Peach Pickle
recipeIngredient: 21 Whole Cloves, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the peaches.
2. Insert 3 or 4 cloves into each peach.
3. Place the peaches in a stone jar.
4. Boil sugar and vinegar until it forms a thick syrup.
5. Pour the syrup over the peaches, pressing them down to ensure they are submerged.
6. Allow the mixture to stand overnight.
7. In the morning, discard the juice and add cinnamon.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil.
9. Return the hot syrup to the jar over the peaches.
10. Repeat this process on the second and third mornings until all the peaches are tender but not overcooked.
11. As each peach is cooked, pack them into canning jars.
12. Boil the remaining syrup until it thickens.
13. Pour the hot syrup over the packed peaches in the jars.
14. Seal the jars securely.
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV ed. 1974
